creator: nik@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

Actually, we should add these links.  It makes it easier for people 
testing changes on the site to check those changes without the hassle 
of setting up Apache, and it means that our mirrors don't have to have 
the same DirectoryIndex settings as we do. 

Basically, making this change doesn't negatively impact on anyone, and 
it does have a positive effect.
